*Amended* Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoenas For Pls' Confidential Psychiatric Records From Drs. Dubberke, Holtzberg And Warren
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Teresa Recor and Bret Recor's motion to quash subpoenas for psychiatric records is granted. The subpoenas are overbroad. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
